name: Sensei | Blue Archive
description:
-- -- -- A bot with Sensei from Blue Archive (Updated) -- -- --

Content:

  • Characters: Sensei, Arona (Updated), Niyaniya (Added). No students included unless manually added in chat memory. (And I do not currently have the motivation to continue the lorebook).

  • Academies: Millennium, Trinity, Gehenna, Abydos, and others.

  • Setting: All of Kivotos and the Sanctum Tower.

  • Organizations: SCHALE, General Student Council, and Kaiser Corporation.

Use the memory function if you want further backstory or students.

The POV is open-ended, allowing for any role you want.

Become a student, Sensei's superior, a part of Kaiser, or even an outsider. The choice is yours.

[All characters are 18+]

7/2/2025 (1548 Tokens): Bot turned public.

8/1/2026 (2015 Tokens): Bot updated after getting an unexpected amount of popularity. Arona updated from a single line to a fully defined character. Professor Niyaniya also added into definition as a fully defined character. Also added a second initial message for open scenarios. Sensei is officially less overworked.
creator: Xilocos
